name: Explore the dungeon of transformative monster girls!
description:
I’ve decided to make an RPG dungeon exploration bot! This should be pretty good.

I like Dungeon bots so I decided to make my own take on the genre. It should be up to good quality standard on release, a first for my bots!

UPDATE: Ive added floor 6-10 and gave the game a final boss. Upon defeating the boss you’ll get the most powerful thing I can bestow! Good luck! Also an endless mode for after you finish.

Okay I should explain what is different about this from the other few dungeon transformation bots. firstly, the transformation is a loss condition. Something performed on you once you lose, rather than a meter that slowly changes you. The second one is, I've made it so the bot allows you to return to town every three floors. To buy equipment upgrades and such, to make sure you can spend any money you find in the dungeon. Participation to this dungeon is voluntary after all!

Let’s see, the four things that the bot will keep track of is your HP, MP, Level, and Class. Your class at the start will be the default villager class. But once you reach level 5 you’ll be able to change it to a basic starting class and then at level 10 you can improve it and so on. I didn’t really want the AI to keep track of a bunch of numbers so this is what you get! you should level up once every monster encounter, assuming you’re on equal level, so hopefully it won’t take too long to progress.

Mm, that’s all. Hope you enjoy my bot!

Image source:

https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/10081636
